---
title: "Courses"
subtitle: This section contains the statistical materials from my PhD courses. 
page-layout: article
anchor-sections: false
search: true
listing:
  id: courses-links
  template: ../../ejs/links.ejs
  contents: courses.yml
---

::: {#courses-links .column-screen-inset-right style="max-width: 850px;"}
:::
